news.title: Project testing fund
news.summary:
Hey, I’m testing my Bitcoin project and need to run a few real transactions.

If anyone can spare a tiny amount (around $0.20–$0.50), it would really help for testing purposes, I will send it back asap.

BTC address: bc1qd30ytdeyvn2v6j98s8raralrs5smpeegrd3h3d

Totally optional—thanks either way!

submitted by /u/Adventurous_Carry106
